data.text: I’m checking the agent usage package and the audit note first so I can verify the dead-code claim against the actual implementation before editing anything.

data.output:
# `ddx agent` surface & dead-code audit

Date: 2026-05-01. Branch: main @ b543f084.

## TL;DR

- `ddx agent` is **NOT gone**. 21 subcommands still register, 100% live (no `Hidden: true`, no `// Deprecated:` markers anywhere in `cli/internal/agent` or `cli/cmd/agent_*.go`).
- Only one of the planned three-layer commands ships at root: `ddx work`. There is **no `ddx run`** and **no `ddx try`** — the FEAT-006 retire/replace plan has not landed for the user-facing surface; documentation in `website/content/` already advertises `ddx run`/`ddx try` as if they exist.
- `cli/internal/agent/` carries ~12 truly-dead production functions and ~5 dead helper funcs in `cli/cmd/agent_*.go` (deadcode -test scope). Several stem from refactor leftovers (especially in `execute_bead_loop.go`, `grade.go`, `routing_metrics.go`).

---

## Phase A — `ddx agent` subcommand inventory

Source: `cli/cmd/agent_cmd.go:67-85` (registration block). Top-level `ddx agent` returns Help. All children are public, none hidden, none deprecated.

| Subcommand                | Registered at line | Role / status          | Notes |
| ------------------------- | ------------------ | ---------------------- | ----- |
| `agent run`               | 67                 | **Required (legacy)**  | Should be replaced by `ddx run`. Heavily referenced by tests, README, docs, AGENTS.md. No top-level alias yet. |
| `agent condense`          | 68                 | Required (niche)       | `agent_cmd.go:419`. No `ddx condense` alias. |
| `agent list`              | 69                 | Required               | Harness inventory. |
| `agent capabilities`      | 70                 | Required               | Per-harness probe. |
| `agent doctor`            | 71                 | Required               | Health check. |
| `agent log`               | 72                 | Required               | Session history; has `agent log reindex` subcommand. |
| `agent benchmark`         | 73                 | **Likely dead**        | No production callers; `DefaultBenchmarkArms` test-only; quorum/grade chain (see Phase B). |
| `agent usage`             | 74                 | Required               | Token consumption (cmd has 3 dead helpers). |
| `agent replay`            | 75                 | Required (low traffic) | Virtual harness replay. |
| `agent execute-bead`      | 76                 | **Required (legacy)**  | Should be replaced by `ddx try` per FEAT-006. Top-level `ddx try` not implemented. |
| `agent execute-loop`      | 77                 | **Deprecated alias**   | `ddx work` already wraps the same code path. Doc text at agent_cmd.go:1504-1555 still recommends it as primary in places, contradicting `cli/_index.md` "prefer ddx work". |
| `agent executions`        | 78                 | Required               | Mirror fetch CLI. |
| `agent workers`           | 79                 | Required               | Server worker view. |
| `agent catalog`           | 80                 | Required               | Model catalog show. |
| `agent providers`         | 81                 | Required               | Endpoint inventory. |
| `agent models`            | 82                 | Required               | Model list. |
| `agent check`             | 83                 | Required               | Static analyses. |
| `agent route-status`      | 84                 | Required               | Routing telemetry. |
| `agent metrics`           | 85                 | Required               | Analytics over evidence. |

**Verdict on Phase A:** the deprecation plan from `/tmp/execute-bead-refactor-proposal.md` §3.3 has not been executed. Three-layer plan delivered only `ddx work`; `ddx run` and `ddx try` do not exist. Nothing in the agent group is marked Hidden or Deprecated.

### Cross-references that block deletion today

- README.md (lines 77, 80, 83, 87, 99-100), CHANGELOG.md, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, website/content/docs/* — all promote `ddx agent run/usage/execute-bead/log/list/doctor` as the canonical surface.
- 32 `cli/cmd/agent_*_test.go` files exec via `NewRootCommand()` and assert `ddx agent <X>` paths.
- Skill manifests under `.agents/skills/` and `.claude/skills/` reference `ddx agent` commands — needs review when surfaces are renamed.
- `cli/cmd/bead_review.go:30-33` long-help suggests `ddx agent run --prompt @-`.

No production code path under `cli/internal/server/` execs the `ddx agent` binary as a subprocess; the server uses the `cli/internal/agent` Go package directly. Subprocess invocations of `ddx agent` are limited to docs/skill prompts.

---

## Phase B — Dead code inventory (deadcode -test ./...)

### Truly dead in `cli/internal/agent/`

| File | Symbol | Evidence |
| ---- | ------ | -------- |
| `ac_structural_check.go:96` | `VerifyACClaims` | Called only from `execute_bead_loop.go:1463` inside the dead `adjudicateNoChanges` (see below). Production uses `adjudicateNoChangesContract`. Dead by transitive orphaning. |
| `ac_structural_check.go:130` | `goFieldDeclared` | Only `VerifyACClaims` calls it. |
| `execute_bead_loop.go:1436` | `ExecuteBeadWorker.adjudicateNoChanges` | Replaced by `adjudicateNoChangesContract` (line 1371). The `agent_cmd.go:889` log message string `"adjudicateNoChanges"` is the only remaining ref and that's just a label. **Refactor leftover from TD-031 NoChangesContract migration.** |
| `format.go:10`  | `FormatComparisonTable` | Used by no production code; quorum/benchmark chain. |
| `format.go:58`  | `FormatGradeTable`     | Same. |
| `grade.go:248`  | `buildGradingPrompt`   | Superseded by `buildGradingPromptBounded` (commits 922cfe3f, 79686945). Old un-bounded grader. |
| `model_catalog_yaml.go:64` | `WriteModelCatalogYAML` | Reader is used; writer is not. |
| `routing_metrics.go:53` | `RoutingMetricsStore.AppendBurnSummary` | `BurnSummary` was a derived view; computation lives in `BuildBurnSummaries` but storage is never appended. |
| `routing_metrics.go:228` | `parseWindowMinutes` | Only test references. |
| `integration_helper_test.go:250,257` | `gitHasMergeCommits`, `refExists` | Test helpers with no callers. |
| `triage_test.go:556` | `countOccurrences` | Test helper with no callers. |

### Truly dead in `cli/cmd/agent_*.go`

| File | Symbol | Notes |
| ---- | ------ | ----- |
| `agent_cmd.go:849` | `harnessHealthyViaService` | Once part of routing-decision UI; removed when `agent doctor --routing` was simplified. |
| `agent_execute_bead.go:22` | `loadExecutionsMirrorConfig` | Mirror config is now read elsewhere (`internal/agent/executions_mirror.go`). |
| `agent_usage.go:246` | `aggregateUsage` | Older aggregator; replaced by streamed shard reader (commit 99033c89 monthly-shard refactor). |
| `agent_usage.go:289` | `aggregateUsageAggs` | Same. |
| `agent_usage.go:480` | `readUsageSessionRecords` | Same. |

### `cli/internal/agent/triage_dispatch.go`, `retry_policy.go`, `escalation/ladder.go`

These appear "unreachable" without `-test` scope but **are** test-covered. Confirmed used by `triage_dispatch_test.go`, `retry_policy_test.go`, `tier_escalation_*_test.go`, etc. **They are not dead in test scope but production routing does not invoke them yet** — they were built ahead of the wiring (commits c7135580, e188d9d3, 9c948479 all 2026-05-02). Pending wire-up is bead ddx-51ac997b's promised follow-up work; flag as "ahead of schedule, not dead" not "remove".

### `cli/internal/agent/escalation/` package

`NewLadder`, `Ladder.Tiers`, `Ladder.Next`, `NoViableProviderError.Error` — fresh code (2026-05-02), test-only callers in production binary. Same status as above: not dead, **not yet wired into ddx work / execute-loop**.

---

## Phase C — Recent-churn orphans (specific commits)

| Commit | Subject | Orphan(s) left behind |
| ------ | ------- | --------------------- |
| `9d988853` (2026-04-29) | delete deprecated routing config + flags with prejudice | Clean — routinglint analyzer guards the deletion (`cli/tools/lint/routinglint/analyzer.go`). `MinTier` field still exists in `internal/config/resolved.go:21,255` and `testconfig.go` but it is the new MinPower-equivalent CLI override surface, not the retired adaptive tier — verified live. |
| `b2c9a245` (3ddf3d52) | metadata-driven tier inference | No legacy "always-cheap default" code remaining; supersedes were inline. |
| `5089b1ec` (a900a034) | retry/escalation policy verification tests | Wired `EvaluateRetryPolicy` into tests but **not into the production execute loop** — `EvaluateRetryPolicy` and `ClassifyRetryOutcome` not called outside `_test.go` files. |
| `da11a34a` (3503f1f0, ba6882a4) | tracker-lock fix | `RunWithLockBackoff`, `attemptIsLockContention`, `LockContentionBackoff` — wired in tests, **no production caller** (verified via grep in non-test files). |
| `61357e13` | singleton server guard | (not in last-50 listing; outside top-50 window — skipped) |
| `b24e9630` (b543f084) | gate no_changes close on NoChangesContract markers | This is what orphaned `adjudicateNoChanges` (replaced by `adjudicateNoChangesContract`). |
| `4d7e1d93` (1f4ba5aa), `f7b4bbc3` (c3a88234) | extract shared execute-bead instruction blocks | Clean — shared blocks are referenced. |

**Pattern:** the most recent escalation/triage/retry-policy work has shipped *implementation + unit tests* but the wiring into the live `execute_bead_loop.go` hot path is missing. This is the dominant source of "dead" symbols by count.

---

## Phase D — Cleanup proposal (bead-sized chunks)

### Bead 1 — Retire `adjudicateNoChanges` and its dead AC-claim helpers
- Delete `ExecuteBeadWorker.adjudicateNoChanges` (`execute_bead_loop.go:1427-1500ish`).
- Delete `VerifyACClaims`, `goFieldDeclared` (`ac_structural_check.go:88-end`).
- Audit `ParseACClaims` — if its only remaining caller is `adjudicateNoChanges`, delete it too. Otherwise keep.
- Update / remove `ac_structural_check_test.go`, `ac_structural_check_operator_prompt_test.go`.
- Scope: ~250 LOC + tests.

### Bead 2 — Collapse `agent_usage.go` to the monthly-shard reader
- Delete `aggregateUsage`, `aggregateUsageAggs`, `readUsageSessionRecords` (`agent_usage.go:245-540`).
- Confirm `usageRow`, `usageAgg`, `usageSessionRecord` still have callers post-deletion; remove if not.
- Verify `agent_usage_test.go` doesn't exercise the dead helpers; if it does, delete those tests.
- Scope: ~300 LOC + tests.

### Bead 3 — Wire (not delete) the recent escalation / retry-policy work
**Different shape from the others — this is "use it or lose it."** Either:
- Wire `EvaluateRetryPolicy`, `RunWithLockBackoff`, `DispatchPostAttempt`, `escalation.Ladder.Next` into the production loop in `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go` (preferred — that was the point of those features), or
- Delete them and their tests.
- Affected files: `retry_policy.go`, `triage_dispatch.go`, `escalation/ladder.go` plus tests.
- Recommend wiring; flag for owner decision before any deletion. **Highest risk of false-positive removal.**

### Bead 4 — Drop quorum/benchmark formatting + grading dead paths
- Delete `format.go` (`FormatComparisonTable`, `FormatGradeTable`).
- Delete `grade.go:buildGradingPrompt` (un-bounded variant superseded by `buildGradingPromptBounded`).
- Delete `model_catalog_yaml.go:WriteModelCatalogYAML`.
- Delete `routing_metrics.go:AppendBurnSummary`, `parseWindowMinutes`.
- Delete `harnessHealthyViaService` in `agent_cmd.go`, `loadExecutionsMirrorConfig` in `agent_execute_bead.go`.
- Drop unused test helpers: `gitHasMergeCommits`, `refExists`, `countOccurrences`.
- Scope: ~500 LOC, low risk.

### Bead 5 — Begin the actual `ddx agent` deprecation per FEAT-006
- Implement `ddx run` as the layer-1 alias (current `ddx agent run`).
- Implement `ddx try` as the layer-2 single-bead command (current `ddx agent execute-bead`).
- Mark `ddx agent run`, `ddx agent execute-bead`, `ddx agent execute-loop` as `Hidden: true` + add `// Deprecated:` comments and emit a stderr deprecation warning.
- Update README.md, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, CHANGELOG, website/content/docs/cli/_index.md and feature pages to lead with `ddx run / try / work`.
- Update skill manifests under `.agents/skills/`, `.claude/skills/` to use the new surface.
- Scope: large; spans CLI + docs + skills. May need to be 2 beads (CLI + docs/skills).

### Bead 6 (optional) — Hide / consolidate niche `ddx agent` subcommands
- `agent benchmark` (no production users; no `cli/internal/agent/grade.go writeGradeArtifacts` flow exercised in tests; verify before keeping).
- `agent condense`, `agent capabilities`, `agent replay` — confirm callers; consider hiding from top-level help.

---

## Risks / false positives

1. **`cli/internal/agent/escalation` and `triage_dispatch.go` and `retry_policy.go`** — flagged as unreachable without `-test`, but they are test-covered new feature work landed within the past 3 days. **Do not delete.** Either wire into prod or escalate to owner.
2. **`MinTier` field in `internal/config/resolved.go`** — name overlaps with the retired adaptive-min-tier concept but is the live MinPower CLI-override field. Keep.
3. **`virtual` harness paths** — appear lightly used; they are the record/replay surface for tests and `agent replay`. Keep (`runner.go:103`, `harness_config.go:153`, `service_run.go:64`).
4. **`RunQuorumWithConfig`** — flagged dead; production calls `RunQuorumWithConfigViaService`. The non-Service variant is genuinely unused. Safe to delete *with* `format.go`, but check `agent_quorum_config_test.go` first — if any test pins `RunQuorumWithConfig` directly, port it to the Service variant.
5. **Skill manifests under `.agents/skills/` and `.claude/skills/`** — these are consumed by Claude/agent harnesses at runtime; renaming `ddx agent run` → `ddx run` requires updating dozens of skill prompts in lockstep. Don't delete the legacy command alias until skills are migrated.
6. **Reflection / build-tagged callers** — `cli/internal/agent/live_harness_integration_test.go` and `no_live_harness_in_default_suite_test.go` use build tags. Run `deadcode` once per build-tag set if doing a hard purge (not done here; this audit is read-only).

---

## Files referenced (absolute paths)

- `/Users/erik/Projects/ddx/cli/cmd/agent_cmd.go` — primary subcommand registration.
- `/Users/erik/Projects/ddx/cli/cmd/agent_execute_bead.go`, `agent_usage.go`, `agent_metrics.go` — dead helpers.
- `/Users/erik/Projects/ddx/cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:1349-1500` — adjudicate orphan.
- `/Users/erik/Projects/ddx/cli/internal/agent/ac_structural_check.go` — orphaned by adjudicate replacement.
- `/Users/erik/Projects/ddx/cli/internal/agent/escalation/ladder.go` — wired in tests only.
- `/Users/erik/Projects/ddx/cli/internal/agent/retry_policy.go`, `triage_dispatch.go` — wired in tests only.
- `/Users/erik/Projects/ddx/cli/internal/agent/format.go`, `grade.go`, `model_catalog_yaml.go`, `routing_metrics.go` — assorted dead funcs.
- `/Users/erik/Projects/ddx/cli/cmd/work.go` — only top-level layer-3 command shipped; `try.go` and `run.go` do not exist.
- `/Users/erik/Projects/ddx/docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-006-agent-service.md` — governing spec for the planned removal.

data.text: The audit already narrows this to `cli/cmd/agent_usage.go`, so I’m verifying which helpers remain, where they’re called, and which tests exercise only the dead path before I cut anything.

The names in the bead don’t match the current file anymore, which suggests the dead helpers may already have been collapsed in this branch. I’m checking the diff and status next so I don’t remove live code or duplicate an existing cleanup.

I verified the target file at `HEAD` and at the bead base: the old symbol names from the audit are not present anymore, and the current helpers are still referenced by the command. I’m doing one broader grep for the specific dead names and then I’ll decide whether this is already done or whether there’s a different stale path to remove.

I haven’t edited anything yet because the repository state already looks like the cleanup may have landed elsewhere. I’m confirming whether the old target file exists at all before I decide between a no-changes evidence file and an actual removal.

data.text: The original file path from the bead doesn’t exist in this checkout, which is a strong sign the cleanup already happened before this attempt. I’m running the requested verification now so I can either close this as already satisfied or identify an unexpected regression.
The checks are still running. If they come back green, I’ll record that the bead was already satisfied in this branch and stop without touching source files.
`go build` is green. `go test ./internal/agent/...` is still finishing, so I’m waiting on that before I decide whether to leave evidence only or make a code change.

I’ve got green test and build results, and the stale dead-symbol names are absent from the checkout. I’m writing a short evidence file now so the execution record clearly captures that this bead was already satisfied in the current branch rather than changed here.
I’m turning the evidence into a small tracker commit so the attempt has an auditable artifact in the branch history, which is the safer path for DDx execution records.

data.text:
No source changes were needed in this checkout: the dead `aggregateUsage*`/`readUsageSessionRecords` symbols from the bead description are already absent, and `cli/internal/agent` does not contain `agent_usage.go` here.

Evidence:
- Added [`no_changes_rationale.txt`](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-a13eb42a-20260505T101154-d0ca2c08/.ddx/executions/20260505T101154-d0ca2c08/no_changes_rationale.txt) with a verification command.
- Verified `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/...` passes.
- Verified `cd cli && go build ./...` passes.
- Committed the evidence as `d8044259` with `[ddx-a13eb42a]`.
